name: datavidence-healthdata
description: Domain plugin for reproducible biostatistics / health-data analysis with R: domain skills (numeric-check, data-contract, table1, cohort-flow, validate-assumptions, onboard-data, method-audit, and more), fail-open governance hooks (data_leak_guard, notation-check, provenance-stamp) and reviewer subagents (methodologist, statistician, reporting-reviewer). Invoked by datavidence-template-project policies; orthogonal to psotobverse-utils (generic workflow). SKELETON — under construction.
